variables.name: project_name
variables.description: Project name prefix for all resources.

variables.name: ami_id
variables.description: Ubuntu 22.04 AMI ID. Must match aws_region.

variables.name: wg_instance_type
variables.description: EC2 instance type for WireGuard server (t3.micro sufficient).

variables.name: vm_instance_type
variables.description: EC2 instance type for workload VM.

variables.name: vm_volume_size_gb
variables.description: Root volume size in GB for workload VM.

variables.name: allowed_ssh_cidr
variables.description: CIDR block allowed SSH access. Restrict to your IP.

variables.name: wg_client_public_key
variables.description: WireGuard client public key from the Proxmox-side template output.

variables.name: wg_server_ip
variables.description: WireGuard tunnel IP for this server.

variables.name: wg_client_ip
variables.description: WireGuard tunnel IP for the Proxmox client.

variables.name: wg_tunnel_cidr
variables.description: WireGuard tunnel CIDR for security group rules.

variables.name: onprem_subnet
variables.description: On-premise subnet to route via WireGuard (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24). Leave empty for tunnel-only.
